title: What a godly man actually does with temptation
caption:
A godly man still gets tempted. That's not the failure. The failure is treating it like a management problem instead of something to put to death.

Name it before you manage it. Tell one man the truth. Fill the vacancy with something real. Run back to the Word when your willpower fails.

"Submit yourselves, then, to God. Resist the devil, and he will flee from you." — James 4:7

Put it to death. That's what a man under Christ actually does.

Save this for the week you need the reminder.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #temptation #christianity #james4
